title: polygalaceae
intro: The polygalaceae rank, also known as the milkwort family, is a taxonomic rank that includes a group of flowering plants. This family is characterized by its diverse range of species, which are typically found in temperate and tropical regions worldwide. The polygalaceae family comprises around 1,300 species, including plants such as milkworts, false heath, and whorled milkwort. These plants often exhibit characteristics like small, five-petaled flowers and leaves that are typically alternate and simple.
